hero.tagline: Turning complex ideas into stories people actually read.
hero.description: Technical writer, SaaS storyteller, lifestyle essayist, and jewellery blogger — with a love for language that spans industries, tones, and formats.

about.quote: Good writing is invisible. It simply takes you somewhere — and leaves you glad you went.
paragraphs: I'm a Technical Content Writer based in Jaipur, India, with a career that spans documentation, SaaS narratives, bid writing, and deeply personal creative work — from jewellery diaries to lifestyle essays.

What ties it all together is a belief that every reader deserves clarity. Whether I'm documenting a software workflow, crafting a SaaS onboarding guide, or telling the story behind a handcrafted ring, I write with precision and heart.
Currently working at Natural Support Consultancy Services, I've previously shaped content at Nimble AppGenie, Tagbox, Quirinus Soft, and R-DGTL.

expertise.title: Technical Writer
expertise.desc: SRS documents, user manuals, API guides, SOPs — I make complex systems legible without losing a single technical detail.

expertise.title: SaaS Writer
expertise.desc: Product tours, onboarding flows, release notes, and help docs that reduce churn and grow product confidence.

expertise.title: Creative Writer
expertise.desc: Essays, short fiction, character studies, and narratives that linger — writing made to be felt, not just read.

expertise.title: Storyteller
expertise.desc: Brand narratives, pitch stories, campaign copy — I find the human thread in every business and pull it into the light.

expertise.title: Lifestyle Blogger
expertise.desc: Wellness, travel, culture, personal growth — warm, conversational writing that builds loyal, returning audiences.

expertise.title: Jewellery Writer
expertise.desc: Product descriptions, lookbooks, heritage stories, and trend pieces for jewellery brands that want to sell beauty, not just metal.

process.name: Listen
process.desc: I start by understanding your audience, tone, purpose, and the gap between where your content is and where it needs to be.

process.name: Research
process.desc: Deep dives into your product, industry, or subject — so I write with authority, not guesswork.

process.name: Craft
process.desc: Draft, refine, read aloud, rewrite. Every sentence earns its place before you see it.

process.name: Refine
process.desc: Two revision rounds included as standard. Feedback welcomed — great writing is always collaborative.

contact.title: Let's make something worth reading.
contact.subtitle: Open to freelance projects, full-time roles, and collaborations of all kinds.
